turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Namaste. Mujhe orthopaedic doctor se milna hai. Mere kamar mein bahut dard hai.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Namaste ji. Zaroor help karenge. Aapka naam aur number?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Shukriya Savitabai ji. Dr. Pramod Joshi orthopaedics mein hain. Kal subah 9 baje ka slot available hai.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Kal subah theek hai. Book kar dijiye.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Ho gaya. Savitabai Jadhav, kal 9:00 AM, Dr. Pramod Joshi. SMS milega confirm karne ke liye. Kuch aur?
